title: Fridge Door Lower Bottle Shelf (Bottom) – Compatible with Logik CE55CW18 – Replacement Door Rack – Also Fits Matsui and Hanseatic Models – Clear Transparent

description: Fridge Door Lower Bottle Shelf – Compatible with Logik CE55CW18 This high-quality lower bottle shelf is a reliable replacement designed to fit the bottom section of your fridge door. Made from clear, durable ABS plastic, it provides strong support for bottles, jars and everyday items while maintaining a clean, modern look. Fully Compatible Models: Logik: CE55CW18 Matsui: M149CW17E, M149CW18E, M149CX17E, M149CX18E, M174CW17E, M174CW18E Hanseatic: HKGK17455A2I, HKGK17455A2W, HKGK17455EL, HKGK17455EW Cost-Effective Alternative: This is a compatible replacement part, offering a more affordable option compared to branded OEM parts while maintaining high performance. Easy to Install: The shelf simply clips into position on the lower door rack slot—no tools needed. Model-Specific Dimensions: Dimensions differ depending on the refrigerator model. Please compare the images and your original shelf before ordering. Returns Policy: Returns accepted within 30 days if unused and in original condition. By purchasing, you agree to our return policy.
